testcase.name: test_romantic_subscription_checkout
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration40_monetization.py:159: in test_romantic_subscription_checkout assert response.status_code in [200, 400] E assert 404 in [200, 400] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_referral_stats

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'total_referrals' in {'bonuses_achieved': {'10_referrals': False, '25_referrals': False, '5_referrals': False}, 'code': 'TIT1F9AEF6D', 'next_bonus': {'count': 5, 'points': 100, 'remaining': 4}, 'referrals': [{'joined_at': '2026-02-02T20:12:16.467670+00:00', 'name': 'testuser1770063135', 'points_earned': 50}], ...}

testcase.name: test_gamification_profile

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'points' in {'action_counts': {'rdv_offer_created': 1, 'referral_success': 1}, 'badges': [{'category': 'rdv', 'condition': {'action': 'rdv_offer_created', 'count': 1, 'type': 'count'}, 'description': 'Créer votre premier rendez-vous', 'icon': '#x1F3AF', ...}], 'badges_count': 1, 'level': {'icon': '#x1F331', 'level': 1, 'min_points': 0, 'name': 'Débutant'}, ...}
